questions.question: Describe the difference between RGB and CMYK color models. Provide an example of when each model is used. (5 marks)
questions.hint: RGB is used for digital displays, while CMYK is used for printing.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a Gaussian filter in color image smoothing? Provide an example of how it can be used to reduce noise in an image. (10 marks)
questions.hint: A Gaussian filter is used to reduce noise in an image by averaging neighboring pixels.

questions.question: Compare the effects of bilateral filtering and unsharp masking on color images. Which method is more suitable for removing noise, and why? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Bilateral filtering is more suitable for removing noise, as it uses the similarity between pixels and their spatial proximity.
